chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-192 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection For hearing of main case 06.09.2023 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri AAG Sindh. ----- This petition was filed belatedly in the year 2018 for the appointment of the petitioner as Junior School Teacher challenging the merit list of May 2013. This petition suffers from laches as has been filed belatedly after five years without any explanation. Dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
